name: Chewy & Chocolatey Peanut Butter Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Pre-heat oven to 375°F (190°C). Place sheets of foil on countertop for cooling cookies.
2. In a large bowl, combine brown sugar, shortening, water, and vanilla. Beat at medium speed of an electric mixer until well blended.
3. Add eggs to the creamed mixture and beat until incorporated.
4. Mix flour, cocoa, baking soda, and salt in another bowl. Stir into the creamed mixture at a low speed just until combined.
5. Fold in peanut butter cups.
6. Using a rounded measuring tablespoon (15 mL), drop dough 2 inches (5 cm) apart onto ungreased baking sheets.
7. Bake one sheet at a time for 7 to 9 minutes, or until cookies are set. Do not overbake. Allow cookies to cool on the sheets for 2 minutes before transferring them to foil to cool completely.
Makes about 3 dozen cookies
